title: Fintech Onboarding Best Practices
content: Key findings from three onboarding redesign projects: progressive disclosure reduces drop-off by 35%, biometric setup in-flow increases security adoption, and a clear progress indicator improves completion rates.
author: Carol Tanaka

title: Design Review Process
content: All design deliverables go through a two-stage review: peer critique followed by stakeholder sign-off. Use the shared Figma template for critique sessions. Reviewers should focus on usability heuristics, accessibility compliance, and brand consistency.
